title: Ocrolus Alternative: Faster, Cheaper Bank Statement Analysis
meta: Looking for an Ocrolus alternative for bank statement analysis? Compare StatementScrub vs Ocrolus on price, speed, setup time, and features for lenders and mortgage brokers.
content:
Why Look for an Ocrolus Alternative?

Ocrolus is a well-known document automation platform used by financial institutions to process bank statements, pay stubs, and tax returns. It's powerful — but it comes with significant trade-offs that make many lenders look for alternatives:

  • Enterprise pricing — Ocrolus requires a sales engagement and is priced for enterprise volumes, making it inaccessible for independent brokers, small lenders, and teams running fewer than hundreds of statements per month.
  • Setup time — Integration requires API development and onboarding, often taking weeks before your first document is processed.
  • Turnaround time — Ocrolus uses a human-in-the-loop review model, meaning results can take minutes to hours rather than seconds.
  • Contract requirements — Annual commitments and volume minimums are common.

For mortgage brokers, MCA lenders, and small-to-mid-size business lenders, these friction points make Ocrolus a poor fit.

StatementScrub as an Ocrolus Alternative

StatementScrub is built specifically for the use cases where Ocrolus is overkill or too expensive: independent mortgage brokers, MCA underwriters, business lenders, and credit analysts who need fast, accurate bank statement analysis without enterprise overhead.

What StatementScrub Does That Ocrolus Doesn't

Beyond the pricing and speed difference, StatementScrub offers some capabilities that Ocrolus doesn't match for lending-specific use cases:

  • APPROVE/REVIEW/DECLINE recommendation — A plain-English AI recommendation with reasoning, not just raw data extraction.
  • Fraud indicator layer — Structuring detection, circular deposits, account cycling, and advance loan app flagging in every report.
  • No minimum volume — Run 1 report or 1,000. Ocrolus typically requires volume commitments.
  • No software installation — Upload from any browser. No IT involvement required.

When Ocrolus Might Still Be the Right Choice

Ocrolus makes sense if you're a large financial institution that needs to process multiple document types (tax returns, pay stubs, and bank statements) in a unified platform, and you have the technical resources and budget for enterprise integration. Its human-in-the-loop review also adds a quality layer that some highly regulated lenders require.

For everyone else — independent brokers, MCA originators, business lenders, and credit analysts — the cost, speed, and simplicity advantage clearly favors a purpose-built alternative.

How to Switch from Ocrolus to StatementScrub

The transition is straightforward:

  1. Create a free account at StatementScrub — no credit card required
  2. Run your first 3 reports free to validate accuracy on your statement types
  3. Use the REST API to integrate into your existing LOS if needed
  4. Choose a credit pack that matches your monthly volume

Most teams are processing live statements within 15 minutes of signing up.

Bottom Line

If you're looking for an Ocrolus alternative that's faster, cheaper, and requires no enterprise contract — StatementScrub is designed exactly for that use case. Start with 3 free reports and compare the output quality directly.
